issues: outline_weight: candidate has no defined hard outline; peers show consistent thin dark pixel outlines throughout
outline_color: peers use near-black #1a1a1a outlines; candidate fades softly at edges with no distinct outline color
shadow_direction: peers show consistent implicit top-left lighting with bottom-right darkening; candidate darkens diffusely at base with no directional shadow
shadow_count: peers have single clear shadow layer; candidate has none — just ambient darkening
highlight_intensity: candidate has overly bright blown-out white/cream highlights (top cluster) completely out of range vs peer highlight intensity
color_temperature: massive mismatch — peers occupy cool-neutral palette (greens, purples, earthy browns, greys); candidate is uniformly warm golden-yellow and cream, zero cool tones
detail_density: peers pack high detail into small footprints (limbs, joints, accessories visible); candidate is a low-detail soft blob at equivalent display scale
proportion: candidate reads as a round amorphous mass; peer sprites have structured silhouettes even for non-humanoid forms

rendering_style: CRITICAL — peers are classic Denzi-lineage RPG pixel art with hard edges and structured anatomy; candidate is kawaii/soft-blob aesthetic with pink blush-cheek pixels — entirely different art school
palette_overlap: candidate palette (warm yellows #F5C842, cream #FFF5CC, light gold) shares <5% overlap with peer sheet palette

charm_level: peers are not especially cute/chibi — they are detailed RPG sprites with neutral affect; candidate is aggressively kawaii with round silhouette and visible blush marks, charm register is completely mismatched
reasoning: Across all 11 dimensions the candidate vfx_explosion_4_v02 reads as a sprite from a different game and different art tradition than the Denzi peer set. The most damning failures are rendering_style (hard RPG pixel art vs kawaii blob), palette_overlap (warm golden vs cool-neutral peer palette), outline_weight/color (no hard outline vs consistent dark outlines across every peer), and charm_level (blush-cheek kawaii explosion vs neutral-affect RPG sprites). Even granting that VFX are a different item type, the core style DNA does not match in any measurable dimension. Score 2/10.
